title: Painted Pottery Sherds
description: This resource pack is simple... All it does is give each Pottery Sherd its own color!
body:
![Painted Pottery Sherds Logo (by Unthink0 Studio)](https://api.mcpedl.com/storage/submissions/222677/images/painted-pottery_2.png)

This resource pack is simple. All it does is give each Pottery Sherd its own color! Should work with most versions of the game (might even work for 1.20, though I haven't tested it to make sure).

If you have any questions, need extre info about my packs, or just want to hang out, then consider joining my public Discord: https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg
